kits.name: The Timberline
kits.description: A boutique mountain lodge in South Lake Tahoe. Pine green, burnt amber, alpine white. Editorial outdoor brand: Outside Magazine meets a small independent boutique hotel. Light, airy, and warm. Not the typical dark luxury mountain lodge.

kits.name: Ridgeline Estate
kits.description: A Napa Valley winery with estate-grown Cabernet, hillside vineyards at golden hour, unhurried tastings. Navy and gold, Cormorant Garamond for character, DM Sans for clarity.

kits.name: Beaver Builder AI Forms
kits.description: A showcase of form experiences built with Beaver Builder AI, styled to match the Beaver Builder AI product site.
